taskVersion.name: feistel_cipher_round_obs_learning
taskVersion.description: Observe 14 plaintext→ciphertext pairs encrypted by a 2-round Feistel cipher with hidden round function F(x)=(ax+b) mod P. Infer the structure and coefficients; submit decrypted plaintexts (L, R) for 4 new ciphertexts.

parts.text:
You are observing a FEISTEL CIPHER encrypting pairs of integers.
Each plaintext and ciphertext is a pair of integers in [0, 28].
The cipher structure and round function are NOT described — deduce them from the examples.

Observations (plaintext L,R → ciphertext C0,C1):
  1. (27, 12) → (19, 16)
  2. (24, 28) → (28, 24)
  3. (13, 1) → (2, 24)
  4. (8, 16) → (15, 16)
  5. (15, 12) → (7, 14)
  6. (25, 26) → (10, 13)
  7. (9, 15) → (9, 2)
  8. (11, 18) → (1, 0)
  9. (28, 6) → (4, 12)
  10. (16, 4) → (26, 23)
  11. (9, 4) → (3, 7)
  12. (24, 3) → (27, 25)
  13. (19, 25) → (2, 0)
  14. (8, 17) → (6, 9)

Decrypt each of the following ciphertexts to recover the original (L, R):
  Q1: ciphertext = (4, 6)
  Q2: ciphertext = (26, 0)
  Q3: ciphertext = (7, 5)
  Q4: ciphertext = (13, 11)

Submit your answers as left_1/right_1, left_2/right_2, left_3/right_3, left_4/right_4.
